name: com.kitforgelabs.mobile-ui-kit
description: Opinionated UGUI router, popup queue and theme contract for hybrid-casual mobile games. Stack-based screens (Push/Pop/Replace), priority-aware popups (Meta < Gameplay < Modal) and one ScriptableObject theme — wire it in five minutes, skin it once, ship it.

samples.description: Zero-dependency bootstrap: a UIManager + PopupManager pair driven by [ContextMenu] entries. No VContainer, no DI — drop the prefab in a scene and press Play.
VContainer LifetimeScope with stub services and UIRouter — opinionated starting point when you already use DI.
